creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I'm trying to find out what the state of this is. Is the problem you
described in this PR [1] still reproducible, or were you able to resolve
it? Please let us know if this PR should be closed.

Regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/124428
